title: Marine Mahjong
description: If you love water and sea-ocean theme, then Marine Mahjong is for you! Match the tiles which have captain hats, ships, boats, sea animals and shellfishes on top! You have 40 minutes, do your best!
instructions: Your goal is to match open pairs of identical tiles and remove them from the board exposing the tiles under them for play The game is finished when all pairs of tiles have been removed from the board or when there are no exposed pairs remaining
